25046.name: Western Channel
25046.description: This wide channel allows ships to pass between the cliff to the south and the low-lying reef you can see to the north. In the distance to the east you can discern the mouth of a small bay. A dark opening gapes at you from the cliff face.

25047.name: The Reef
25047.description: Some parts of the reef project above the surface of the water, but for the most part, the face of it lays just under the surface. It would definitely tear the bottom out of any ship unwary enough to run aground here. Fortunately, you don't sit too low in the water and can float right over.

25048.name: The Reef
25048.description: A brilliant menagerie of sea life makes its home here in the reef. Starfish cling to its surface like ornaments pasted there by a happy child. Most of the reef lays slightly beneath the surface and you pass over it without difficulty. A large, ocean-going vessel would certainly meet its doom here though; its underside smashed and torn by the sharp rock.

25049.name: The Cavern
25049.description: Swells lap at the rocky ground as it slopes up out of the ocean and climbs to the south. The cavern seems alive with rustles and whispers as the ever- present sound of water in motion is echoed back from a thousand sources.

25050.name: Wide Tunnel
25050.description: The clammy air seems heavy in your lungs as you move along this wide rock tunnel. Wafts of fresh sea air swirl in from the north where a large cavern beckons. The tunnel narrows as it climbs further to the south.

25051.name: The Passage
25051.description: The soft shuffling of your feet is the only sound in this silent, rocky passage. The passage extends out of sight to the north but seems to terminate nearby to the south. A dark opening to the east silently watches your progress and invites you to enter.

25052.name: Base of the Shaft
25052.description: You stand at the foot of a vertical shaft which climbs straight up into darkness. What are unmistakably hand and footholds have been carved into the side of the shaft as an aid to climbers.

25053.name: The Cave
25053.description: You stand at the north end of a cave that extends into darkness to the south. The cave is large enough for comfortable travel but the floor is uneven and littered with chunks of stone. A narrow opening gapes on darkness to the west.

25054.name: The Cave
25054.description: Irregularly located shards of jagged stone reach for you from the walls, forcing you to watch your step and stick to the center of the cave. The quiet lapping of water can be heard from the south.

25055.name: The Cave
25055.description: You stand at the edge of a large pool which occupies the cave's southern end. The quiescence of the pool's surface is occasionally broken by slow, undulating ripples. The cave continues to the north.

25056.name: Submerged Passage
25056.description: The water is cool though not unpleasantly so, and it is clear enough that you can see your surroundings quite clearly. Pools of darkness to the south and above your head indicate openings in those directions.

25057.name: Submerged Passage
25057.description: Schools of tiny fish dart away at your approach. The water becomes slightly murky as your alien passage disturbs sediment accumulated over ages. The passage continues into inky blackness to the north and south.

25058.name: Crab`s Lair
25058.description: The water is suddenly aswirl with bric-a-brac as your passage sets it in motion. Looking closer, you recognize fragments of large shells, fish skeletons and the claw of a lobster. Something is a very messy eater...

25059.name: Watery Vault
25059.description: Though all the surrounding tunnels are natural formations, this vault was obviously built by someone for a purpose. The identity of the builders may remain a mystery, but their intentions are clear. The heavy construction and disguised entrance imply that security was the goal.

25063.name: Barnacle Patch
25063.description: You have come to a tunnel whose walls, ceiling and floor are encrusted with barnacles. The bodies of the disgusting little creatures pulsate with the rhythmic tempo of their breathing. The tunnel continues to the east and west.

25064.name: Barnacle Patch
25064.description: You have come to a tunnel whose walls, ceiling and floor are encrusted with barnacles. The bodies of the disgusting little creatures pulsate with the rhythmic tempo of their breathing. The tunnel continues to the east and west. Another chamber is to the north.

25065.name: Mired in Seaweed
25065.description: The walls here glow with a pale green light. The light is evidently sufficient to nurture plant life for this area is practically choked by thick, ropy strands of seaweed. It is only with considerable effort that you force your way through.

25066.name: Bone Soup
25066.description: This rock chamber is roughly bowl shaped and its bottom is littered with thousands of bones. Large ones, small ones, all shapes and sizes. The one thing they have in common is they all look a little chewed...

25067.name: Eel`s Nest
25067.description: The floor of the tunnel is flat and sandy. The water feels somehow charged with excitement and your skin tingles slightly.

25068.name: Sandy Passage
25068.description: The sandy floor of this broad tunnel heads away from you to the north and south, losing itself in the gloom. There is an opening in the rock wall to your east.

25069.name: Sandy Passage
25069.description: The sandy floor of this broad tunnel heads away from you to the north and south, losing itself in the gloom.

25070.name: Grotto
25070.description: You are in the southeast corner of a vast, underwater grotto. Delicate coral arches and spires reach from the floor into the gloom above. Broad arches allow passage to the north and west.

25071.name: Grotto Entrance
25071.description: You stand at the entrance to a vast chamber. Visibility is good and still you cannot see the chamber walls in any direction. Delicate, coral arches and spires reach from the floor into the gloom above.

25072.name: Grotto
25072.description: You are in the southwest corner of a vast, underwater grotto. Delicate coral arches and spires reach from the floor into the gloom above. Broad arches allow passage to the north and east.

25073.name: Grotto
25073.description: You are in the northwest corner of a vast, underwater grotto. Delicate coral arches and spires reach from the floor into the gloom above. Broad arches allow passage to the south and east.

25074.name: Grotto
25074.description: You are at the north end of a vast, underwater grotto. Delicate coral arches and spires reach from the floor into the gloom above. Broad arches allow passage to the south, east and west. The entrance to another chamber is to the north.

25075.name: Grotto
25075.description: You are in the northeast corner of a vast, underwater grotto. Delicate coral arches and spires reach from the floor into the gloom above. Broad arches allow passage to the south and west.

25076.name: Nursery
25076.description: Bright gold starfish and colorful pieces of coral are stuck to the walls of this small chamber. The water is somewhat murky from the sediment stirred by the quick passage of small bodies.

25077.name: Murky Bend
25077.description: The floor is thick with fine silt which turns the water opaque as you pass through. There seems to be a faint glow, a lesser darkness, to the west. A dark space yawns to the north.

25078.name: Coral Garden
25078.description: A diffuse, pearly radiance filters from above to bathe the area in soft green light. Delicate looking growths of coral bask in the light and seem to add their own essence to it. This is a local phenomenon though and you can see dark spaces yawning to the south, east and west.

25079.name: Pink Sands
25079.description: The sand doesn't look pink until you get very close, but once you get close enough, it gleams with colors ranging from deep red to a pink so pale it is almost white.

25080.name: Watery Boudoir
25080.description: A flat stone against the east wall serves as a low table. Currently it is occupied by a silver comb and brush, both of which are badly tarnished. A jagged piece of broken mirror has been affixed to the wall and a brass belt buckle has been hung beside it as if for lack of a better place.

npcs.name: Beautiful mermaid
npcs.description: Golden hair frames a finely chiseled face of elfin beauty.  She has a very charming way about her, even though she looks a little like a fish.

25081.name: Dancing Waters
25081.description: The water here is a pure, crystal blue; the essence of water. On every side, small whirlpools twist and caper with joyous abandon, orbiting you as if to draw you into their merry revelry. The area is suffused with an undertone of fearsome, but benevolent, power. A pale metallic shimmer catches the light.

25060.name: Top of the Shaft
25060.description: You are standing on a ledge on the brink of a rough, circular shaft that drops into darkness. Hand and foot holds have been cut from the rock to make the climb easier. A mouldering, wooden panel is affixed to the north wall by rusted iron hinges.

25061.name: Tomb
25061.description: This small, blank and rough walled chamber smells of old death. Two skeletons lay sprawled on the floor and a third is stretched out on a rough wooden cot. Various personal effects are scattered about, the door you came through is to the south.

25062.name: Treasure Chamber
25062.description: From the tool marks on the walls, it is apparent that this tiny chamber was painstakingly carved from the living rock. There is just enough room for one person to squeeze in.

25082.name: The Pool
25082.description: You stand in a circular room with a clear, blue pool in its center. The surface of the pool is alive with small whirlpools spinning merrily. There are doorways in each of the cardinal directions, a particularly large one to the north.
